---
title: "visualising_simulated_data"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
pacman::p_load(here, tidyverse, ggplot2, patchwork)
```

```{r}

#get all csvs
files <- list.files(
  path = "scenario_data/",
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE,
  recursive = TRUE
)

#make longformat for plotting
scenarios_long <- map_dfr(files, read_csv, .id = "file")


```


```{r}
#make a new column with difference from first rating to group rating
scenarios_long <- scenarios_long %>% 
  mutate(feedback = group_ratings - first_ratings,
         weights = paste0("w1: ", w_first, "    ", "w2: ", w_group))

#make plots
p1 <- ggplot(scenarios_long, aes(x = first_ratings, y = second_rating, color = feedback)) +
  
  #make jittered points
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  
  #make heat mapping of points based on feedback
  scale_color_continuous(high = "red", low = "blue") +
  
  #draw line of x=y
  geom_abline(linetype = "dashed", alpha = .5) +
  
  #make labs
  labs(x = "first rating", y = "second rating") +
  
  #theme
  theme_minimal() +
  
  #facet by weights
  facet_wrap(~weights)

#call plot
p1
```
